metadata.task: Disturb the damped oscillator and observe how amplitude changes over time as damping is increased. Return 1 if higher damping makes amplitude decay faster, 2 if it makes decay slower, and 3 if it has no meaningful effect.
metadata.description: Track the mass position over repeated time samples after a disturbance. Compare decay behavior between lower- and higher-damping trials before choosing the numeric damping code.

expected_behavior: The LLM identifies faster amplitude decay in the higher-damping trial.
reasoning: Higher damping dissipates energy more quickly, so the numeric damping code is 1.
